notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee grounds into a double play, first baseman Pavin Smith to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Pavin Smith. Rafael Devers out at 2nd. Jung Hoo Lee out at 1st.
